description_long: This coupe car features a muscular, aggressive design with a matte black finish and prominent wide fenders. The hood is equipped with a large, exposed engine intake, suggesting high performance and a racing or custom build. The rear includes a large spoiler and a spare tire mounted on the trunk, while the sides display side exhaust pipes and rugged, off-road style wheels. The front grille is wide and flanked by four round headlights, giving it a classic American muscle car appearance. The windows are tinted, and the roofline is a hardtop with a slightly sloped fastback profile. The overall look is reminiscent of a modified late-1960s or early-1970s muscle car, possibly inspired by vehicles from action movies.
description: A matte black, heavily modified coupe car with a muscular build, exposed engine intake, side exhausts, and off-road wheels. Features include a large rear spoiler, spare tire, and classic muscle car styling.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the large spoiler, spare tire on the trunk, and dual rear exhausts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the side exhaust, rugged wheels, and the aggressive stance.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, four round headlights, and prominent hood scoop.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the side exhaust and overall coupe proportions.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
